title: Hardcoded dependency addresses without chain/code validation can cause catastrophic misdeployment loss
reason: Mainnet-specific constants are explicit (e.g., `ETH Mainnet` comments); this is primarily deployment-configuration risk rather than a permissionless in-protocol exploit.

title: Rebalance directionMask is not validated and can corrupt encoded pool routing bits
reason: Malformed `directionMask` is caller-controlled in a public function and mainly self-inflicts revert paths; no concrete theft or third-party DoS path was established.

title: VirtualToken.takeLoan is payable and can trap ETH with no dedicated recovery path
reason: Only trusted `validFactories` can call `takeLoan`; current in-scope factory flow does not forward ETH, so no realistic permissionless exploit was shown.

title: Unrestricted quoteToken routing turns whitelisted router into a generic vETH cash-out bridge
reason: Routing arbitrary vETH pairs appears intentional router behavior; no demonstrated drain or whitelist bypass beyond normal AMM trading was substantiated.

title: VirtualToken.cashOut burns tokens before sending underlying assets
reason: Incorrect: if underlying transfer fails, the transaction reverts atomically and the prior burn is rolled back.

title: LamboRebalanceOnUniwap executes swaps with hardcoded zero minimum return
reason: Merged into existing F-008 (same root cause: `minReturn=0` and missing slippage floor).

title: Rebalance lacks slippage protection on caller-provided amountOut
reason: Merged into existing F-008 (same root cause: `amountOut` ignored and no enforced minimum output).

title: VirtualToken.repayLoan can burn tokens without corresponding debt reduction
reason: Incorrect: function is `onlyValidFactory`, and `_decreaseDebt` must pass before burn, preventing debt/accounting mismatch claims.

title: Rebalance onMorphoFlashLoan lacks validation on pool parameter
reason: Pool address is initialized state, not user-provided per call; candidate did not demonstrate a practical permissionless exploit path.

title: Router buyQuote allows overpayment without full refund
reason: Merged into existing F-004 (same 1-wei refund shortfall).

title: Rebalance extractProfit can drain flash loaned funds
reason: Not feasible in stated form: `extractProfit` cannot interleave inside the same flash-loan execution; any failed repayment would revert atomically.
